firstNightReminder: Show them 5 out of play characters. They choose 1 of the characters. Run their ability as needed.
otherNightReminder: They choose 1 of the characters. Run their ability as needed.
name: Huli Jing Ω
ability: You start knowing 5 out-of-play characters. Each night, choose one of them: you have its ability & might register as it would until dusk.
flavor: For shame! How dare you accuse me of being a mischievous fox spirit when I have been nothing but loyal as your… uhm, baker? Wait, no, I misspoke, I’m a fisherwoman.

otherNightReminder: They choose a player. If a player has become Gyutaro, tell them.
name: Daki Ω
ability: Each night*, choose a player (not yourself): they die. If 5 or more players are alive & you die, a player becomes an evil Gyutaro.
flavor: We beautiful, powerful demons can do whatever we want!

otherNightReminder: They choose a player. If it was the first time an evil player was executed today, tell a good player Gyutaro is in-play.
name: Gyutaro Ω
ability: Each night*, choose a player, they might die. The first time an evil player is executed, a good player learns you are in-play tonight. [This cannot be chosen during setup]
flavor: The two of us, together, we’re invincible. We can stand the cold. We can stand the hunger.

name: Rasputin Ω
ability: You are a co-storyteller. Each night, you may choose the information given to a player. You can not speak (except to the storyteller) or vote.

name: Hopeful Ω
ability: If evil has won, publicly guess each players character: if correct, good wins instead, even if dead.
